tracks.meaning: the act of resolving, settling, or finding a solution to a problem or disagreement
a formal decision or determination made by a court, legislature, or governing body
the number of pixels, dots, or lines per unit of measurement that determine the clarity of a digital image or display
the process of converting a domain name into an IP address or vice versa in network communications
the conclusion or settling of a musical dissonance into consonance
the disappearance or healing of a disease, inflammation, or medical condition
a firm determination or strong intention to do something in the future
the level of detail or fineness with which something can be measured or distinguished
the clarity and distinctness with which sounds, images, or transmitted information are perceived
the fineness or quality of detail achievable in a printed image, measured in dots per inch
